base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of tileset_overworld — a tile (tile_atlas) from 1986 dragon quest. Overworld map tileset — grass, forest (trees), mountain, desert, swamp (poison-tile), river, bridge, shore, deep-water, rock, plain-grass. Each terrain encodes movement cost and encounter rate. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Overworld map tileset — grass, forest (trees), mountain, desert, swamp (poison-tile), river, bridge, shore, deep-water, rock, plain-grass. Each terrain encodes movement cost and encounter rate
